Name: 3d printed case (Printing Legion)
Purpose: The main body for all the components

Name: TowerPro SG90 Mini Servo
Purpose: Controlling the angle of the airfoil.

Name: LM2596 2A Buck Step-down Power Converter
Purpose: Most of the electronics can not run on 12 volts except for the fan. The buck converter reduces the voltage to 5V for the other electronics.

Name: 2.4-inch SPI Interface 240x320 TFT Display Module
Purpose: Screen to show the stats of the wind tunnel

Name: Rotary Encoder
Purpose: Controlling the speed of the fan and angle of the servo motor.

Name: Teensy 4.1
Purpose: The microcontroller to control all electronics within the wind tunnel

Name: Ant Esports Carbonflow 120mm Case Fan
Purpose: The fan helps in pulling the air from front of the wind tunnel.
